untranslatable_reason: This signal requires OPTIONS-SPECIFIC metrics (implied volatility vs model volatility, vega, spread construction, theoretical spread value) that are not available in the provided technical indicator set. The backtest engine contains only price action and standard technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.), but lacks: (1) implied volatility data, (2) option Greeks (vega, delta, gamma, theta), (3) theoretical option pricing models, (4) spread-specific valuation. This is an options volatility strategy that cannot be mechanically translated to equity price/volume indicators.
translation_notes: Signal source: Natenberg - a foundational options trading reference discussing volatility spread construction. The rule requires options market data and derivative pricing models that are outside the scope of a price-based backtest engine. To implement this signal, the engine would need integration with options data providers (IV surfaces, Greeks chains) and options pricing libraries.
